title: NitroPlots
description: The Best & Newest Plotsquared Addon with Borders ✔️ Walls✔️ Member Settings✔️Flags✔️ Biomes & more!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e17de3bad425f5e12b83c5e61e3e187ab3d5c15.png)

- (!) Server version: 1.21 - 1.21.11
- (!) Java version: 21
- (!) Dependencies: Plotsquared v7
- 
- (✔) Support: https://discord.com/invite/rZSDt7xykb (200+ Member)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a62d06834226e14453ff3187b870cf84ed69b9e7_0.webp)

- ✅ Hex Color Support
- ✅ Main Plot Menu
- ✅ Plot List with teleport
- ✅ Change Plot Biome
- ✅ Change Plot Weather
- ✅ Clear permissions system
- ✅ Change Plot Time
- ✅ Plot Enter Messages (actionbar,titles,bossbar)
- ✅ Full Plot Flags System
- ✅ Plot Borders with multiple categories
- ✅ Plot Walls with multiple categories
- ✅ Plot Member list
- ✅ Plot Member manage
- ✅ Custom Player Heads (Base64 textures)
- ✅ Fully editable menus
- ✅ Live config reload
- ✅ Owner and plot-location detection

**SHOWCASE**

PLOTMENU SHOWCASE

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37c0720e6a390e2ad9ac0989520e298e13b07eed_0.webp)

Plot Enter Messages
(Choose between ACTION BAR, BOSS BAR, TITLES mode in the menu)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e338a28636a1fc136ca8409f0cb808d6ab289cf3.png)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b311b76edb2018971c1b4482a858cef09236fd6.png)

You can find the complete permissions list here:

[PERMISSIONS LIST](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZmhrwlGBezw19P26RE7wqlJRBy5NuGX6tZj4yTtlZGw/edit?usp=sharing)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c078aa46d23c8e5bd9b435bdacf1d1664cb235.png)

⭕PREMIUM NITROPLOTS⭕

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[*] You may NOT distribute the plugin to anyone else.
[*] You may NOT attempt to decompile the plugin or modify the source code in any way.
[*] You can ONLY run the plugin on servers that you directly own, there is no server limit as long as you own the server.

</details>
